p2|COR.summary: Perception of change in corruption levels compared to childhood (worse/same/better).

p10_1|COR.summary: Agreement with making prohibited turns while driving as acceptable behavior (agree/disagree).

p11|COR.summary: Action taken when seeing someone drop their wallet (return/keep/other).

p12|COR.summary: Whether respondent more commonly offers money or is asked for money to expedite procedures.

p16|COR.summary: Perception of where corruption is most prevalent (sector/institution).

p18|COR.summary: Perception of where sanctions for lying, deception, or theft are most strictly enforced (location/institution).

p29|COR.summary: Location or institution where corruption act was reported (location/institution).

p30|COR.summary: Reason why respondent did not report the corruption act (reason).

p33|COR.summary: Outcome when respondent has reported authority abuse (outcome).

p36_1|COR.summary: Rating of how much government helps fight corruption on a 0-10 scale.

p37|COR.summary: Perception of where values like honesty, transparency, and legality are most prioritized in education (location/institution).
